18.gl: ornament (abstractly or concretely, literally or figuratively)
18.kj: beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty.

18.gl: a round pendant for the neck
18.kj: ornament, round tire like the moon.

18.gl: the Lord (used as a proper name of God only)

19.dv: from H8324 (שָׁרַר) in its original sense of pressing;

19.gl: a pendant for the ears (especially of pearls)

20.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
20.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

20.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
20.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

20.gl: properly, a whisper, i.e. by implication, (in a good sense) a private prayer, (in a bad one) an incantation; concretely, an amulet

21.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
21.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

21.gl: properly, a seal (as sunk into the wax), i.e. signet (for sealing); hence (generally) a ring of any kind

21.dv: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

22.gl: properly, cut out (or hollow), i.e. (by implication) a pocket
22.dv: or חָרִט; from the same as H2747 (חֶרֶט);

22.kj: changeable suit of apparel, change of raiment.

23.gl: a head-dress (i.e. piece of cloth wrapped around)
23.dv: or צָנוֹף; or (feminine) צָנִיפָה; from H6801 (צָנַף);

23.gl: a tablet for writing (as bare); by analogy, a mirror (as a plate)

23.dv: from an unused root meaning to envelop;
from H7286 (רָדַד) in the sense of spreading;

24.gl: an action (good or bad); generally, a transaction; abstractly, activity; by implication, a product (specifically, a poem) or (generally) property
24.kj: act, art, [phrase] bakemeat, business, deed, do(-ing), labor, thing made, ware of making, occupation, thing offered, operation, possession, [idiom] well, (handy-, needle-, net-) wo

24.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
24.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

24.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
24.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

24.gl: properly, a mesh (as allowing a liquid to run through), i.e. coarse loose cloth or sacking (used in mourning and for bagging); hence, a bag (for grain, etc.)
something turned (rounded), i.e. a curl (of tresses)
24.dv: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the sense of knotting up round and hard;

24.gl: fragrance; by implication, spicery; also the balsam plant
24.dv: or בֹּשֶׂם; from the same as H1313 (בָּשָׂם);

25.gl: to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative)
25.kj: be accepted, cast (down, self, (lots), out), cease, die, divide (by lot), (let) fail, (cause to, let, make, ready to) fall (away, down, -en, -ing), fell(-ing), fugitive, have (inhe

25.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
25.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
25.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

25.gl: properly, an adult (as of full length); by implication, a man (only in the plural)
drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
25.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.

25.gl: a battle (i.e. the engagement); generally, war (i.e. warfare)
25.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם) (in the sense of fighting);

26.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
26.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

26.gl: to be (or make) clean (literally or figuratively); by implication (in an adverse sense) to be bare, i.e. extirpated
26.kj: acquit [idiom] at all, [idiom] altogether, be blameless, cleanse, (be) clear(-ing), cut off, be desolate, be free, be (hold) guiltless, be (hold) innocent, [idiom] by no means, be

26.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
26.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
26.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

26.gl: an opening (literally), i.e. door (gate) or entrance way
26.kj: door, entering (in), entrance (-ry), gate, opening, place.
